violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

Yogurt packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting and is in poor repair. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
The ceiling in the back room area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the back room area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
